introSection:
Zyklon was a sit-down roller coaster located at Morey's Piers in Wildwood, New Jersey, USA. It was built by Pinfari.

Zyklon took the place of the Wild Mouse on Mariner’s Landing.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride had a standard model, and took up a compact footprint.

fullText:
Zyklon was a sit-down roller coaster located at Morey's Piers in Wildwood, New Jersey, USA. It was built by Pinfari.

Zyklon took the place of the Wild Mouse on Mariner’s Landing.

The ride had a standard model, and took up a compact footprint.
